collections.name: Beginner repair kits
collections.description: Focused kits for cracked panes, loose came, transom cleaning, and cabinet-panel refreshes.

products.name: Cracked-Pane Patch Kit
products.description: Small glass sheet, copper foil, patching guide, gloves, and repair labels for a single damaged pane.

products.name: Loose-Came Stabilizer Kit
products.description: Lead came sample lengths, flux brush, patina, cleanup cloth, and a guide for tightening small sections.

products.name: Transom Cleaning Kit
products.description: Polish, respirator-safe cleanup supplies, soft cloths, repair labels, and a gentle old-glass care card.

products.name: Cabinet-Panel Refresh Kit
products.description: Cleaning cloths, polish, glazing compound, color story card, and labels for small leaded cabinet panels.

collections.name: Glass and surface goods
collections.description: Small colored glass sheets, textured clear glass, copper foil, lead came sample lengths, patina, glazing compound, and polish.

products.name: Jewel-Tone Glass Sheet Trio
products.description: Small amber, emerald, and ruby sheets sized for cabinet panels and patch work.

products.name: Textured Clear Glass Pair
products.description: Two textured clear sheets for transoms, window lights, and salvaged-panel repairs.

products.name: Copper Foil Roll
products.description: Copper foil for small stained-glass repairs and beginner patch workflows.

products.name: Patina & Polish Pair
products.description: Patina bottle with old-glass polish and cloth for cared-for finishing.

products.name: Glazing Compound Tin
products.description: Bench-size compound for small transom and window-light maintenance.

collections.name: Tools and safety
collections.description: Glass cutters, running pliers, soldering irons, flux brushes, cleanup supplies, gloves, and bench mats.

products.name: Glass Cutter & Running Pliers Set
products.description: Starter cutting pair for small colored glass and textured clear panes.

products.name: Small-Repair Soldering Iron
products.description: Compact iron sized for foil repairs, came touch-ups, and bench work.

products.name: Flux Brush Pack
products.description: Disposable brushes for controlled flux application during small repairs.

products.name: Cleanup Gloves & Bench Mat
products.description: Gloves, mat, and cleanup supplies for safer glass handling.

collections.name: Pattern and planning materials
collections.description: Reusable pattern paper, color story cards, repair labels, measurement templates, and restoration logbooks.

products.name: Pattern Paper & Template Pack
products.description: Reusable paper, measurement templates, color story cards, and repair labels.

products.name: Restoration Logbook
products.description: Project notes for old-window measurements, glass choices, repairs, and care dates.

products.name: Color Story Card Set
products.description: Jewel-tone planning cards for matching colored glass to existing panels.

collections.name: Display and finishing bundles
collections.description: Salvaged-panel hanging kits, window-light styling kits, and entryway transom care bundles.

products.name: Salvaged-Panel Hanging Kit
products.description: Finishing hardware for making a flea-market panel usable and display-ready.

products.name: Window-Light Styling Kit
products.description: Care and styling goods for bringing small old-window details back into daily use.

products.name: Entryway Transom Care Bundle
products.description: Cleaning, polish, labels, and finishing supplies for entryway transom maintenance.
